description_long: This is a large, stately house set within a spacious, fenced property featuring manicured lawns, mature trees, and several outdoor amenities. The main building is constructed with red brick and has a symmetrical facade, prominent white-trimmed windows, and a dark, multi-gabled roof. The property includes a detached garage, a swimming pool, a tennis court, and a driveway leading to the main entrance, which is accentuated by a small portico with columns. The rear of the house opens to a patio area and landscaped gardens, with additional pathways and decorative shrubs. The windows are arranged in regular, symmetrical rows, and the overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and Georgian architectural influences. The grounds are enclosed by a low brick wall with a gated entry, providing both privacy and a sense of grandeur.
description: A grand, red-brick house with a dark gabled roof, symmetrical windows, and a columned entry, set on a large, landscaped property with a pool, tennis court, and detached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with columns, symmetrical windows, and the driveway leading to the house.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, patio, and landscaped backyard with visible garden features.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the detached garage, tennis court, and the rear garden area with additional trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, more of the lawn, and the arrangement of trees and fencing around the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a small portico, white columns, steps, and decorative trim
